reason.Files: Used for features like uploading, downloading and managing files

reason.WebRtc: Used for real-time communication features like voice and video calls

reason.StatementSubmit: Used to submit statements to the statement store

customChains.emptyState: No custom chains added. Connect to a local Substrate node or custom hosted chain.

errors.invalidUrlDescription: Must be a ws:// or wss:// URL
errors.duplicateBuiltinDescription: This chain is already a built-in chain

permissionSettings.heading: Permissions
permissionSettings.subheading: Review and manage app access to features and data
permissionSettings.appCount: {count, plural, =0 {No apps} one {# app} other {# apps}}

detail.noApps: No apps have requested this permission

Clipboard.label: Clipboard
Clipboard.description: Used for copying and pasting content you choose to share

rule.1: Access only after explicit user action (e.g., paste)
rule.3: Data is not stored or transmitted without permission

Microphone.label: Microphone
Microphone.description: Used for features like voice calls, messaging and audio recording

Camera.label: Camera
Camera.description: Used for features like video calls, QR scanning and media capture

rule.1: Access only when you actively use the camera
rule.3: Visual indicator when the camera is active
rule.4: No data is stored or shared without your permission

Notifications.label: Notifications
Notifications.description: Used to send you updates, alerts and important information

rule.2: No access to sensitive data through notifications

Bluetooth.label: Bluetooth
Bluetooth.description: Used for connecting to nearby devices and data transfer

rule.2: No background connections without your interaction
rule.3: No access to sensitive data without permission

Location.label: Location
Location.description: Used for location-based services and content personalization

rule.1: Location is not used in the background
rule.2: Location is used only when needed for specific features
rule.3: Location data is not stored or shared without permission

Biometrics.label: Biometrics
Biometrics.description: Used for features that require verifying your identity

rule.1: Used only after your explicit authentication (e.g., Face ID or Touch ID)
rule.2: Biometric data is never accessed or stored by this product
rule.3: Authentication is handled securely by your device
rule.4: Used only for unlocking or approving actions

OpenExternalUrl.label: Open External URL
OpenExternalUrl.description: Used to open external links in your default browser

rule.1: Links are opened only after your interaction
rule.2: No automatic redirects or background actions
rule.3: Only explicitly requested URLs are opened
rule.4: No data is shared without your permission

ExternalRequest.label: Web Domains
ExternalRequest.description: Used to make HTTP requests to the following domains

rule.1: Requests are limited to specified domains only
rule.2: No automatic data sharing without user action
rule.3: All requests go through host mediation
rule.4: No access to local or sensitive data by default

WebRtc.label: WebRTC
WebRtc.description: Used for real-time communication features like voice and video calls

rule.2: No background connections without your interaction
rule.3: Direct connections are established only when needed
rule.4: May expose your IP address during use

ChainSubmit.label: Chain Submit
ChainSubmit.description: Used to broadcast signed transactions to any Substrate chain

rule.1: Only signed transactions can be submitted
rule.2: No transactions are created or modified automatically
rule.3: Submission happens only after your confirmation
rule.4: No access to your private keys or sensitive data

PreimageSubmit.label: Preimage Submit
PreimageSubmit.description: Used to submit preimage data to the bulletin chain

rule.1: Only signed transactions can be submitted
rule.2: Submission happens only after your confirmation
rule.3: Data is submitted exactly as provided, without modification
rule.4: No access to your private keys or sensitive data

StatementSubmit.label: Statement Submit
StatementSubmit.description: Used to submit statements to the statement store

rule.1: Only signed transactions can be submitted
rule.2: No transactions are created or modified automatically
rule.3: Submission happens only after your confirmation
rule.4: No access to your private keys or sensitive data

rule.1: Reveals your primary username to the product
rule.3: No other personal data is shared
rule.4: You can revoke access later in Settings

Files.label: Files
Files.description: Used for features like uploading, downloading and managing files

rule.1: Access only to files you explicitly select
rule.2: No background access to your files
rule.3: Files are not modified without your action
rule.4: No files are shared without your permission

changeNetworkDialog.title: Change testnet endpoint and log out?
changeNetworkDialog.description: Switching the endpoint will log you out and reload the app. You will need to sign in again.

updateDialog.description: This will store the app version {version} for use without internet
